教材把完整官方英文名作为英语表达教授；各词均为英语词，整段按清晰通用美语朗读，中文馆名只作释义。
source_locations: Unit 1 Lesson 2；Word List 第98页；中国国家图书馆官方英文页面

glossary.pronunciation_basis: 教材与机构官方英文网站采用完整英语名称；各词按清晰通用美语朗读，中文馆名只作释义。

contexts.text: Hi, Lingling. Did you travel this summer vacation?
contexts.synthesis_text: Hi, Lingling. Did you travel this summer vacation?

contexts.text: No, I didn’t. I stayed in Beijing. I went to the National Library of China on foot and read books there.
contexts.synthesis_text: No, I didn’t. I stayed in Beijing. I went to the National Library of China on foot and red books there.

contextual_pronunciation.display_text: No, I didn’t. I stayed in Beijing. I went to the National Library of China on foot and read books there.
contextual_pronunciation.spoken_text: No, I didn’t. I stayed in Beijing. I went to the National Library of China on foot and red books there.
contextual_pronunciation.reason: 整段在叙述已经发生的暑假经历，read 是过去式。

contexts.text: That’s good. Did you also stay in Beijing, Maomao?
contexts.synthesis_text: That’s good. Did you also stay in Beijing, Maomao?

contexts.text: Yes, I did. I worked as a volunteer at China Science and Technology Museum.
contexts.synthesis_text: Yes, I did. I worked as a volunteer at China Science and Technology Museum.

contexts.text: Wonderful! When did you work there?
contexts.synthesis_text: Wonderful! When did you work there?

contexts.text: Is the museum far from your home? How did you get there?
contexts.synthesis_text: Is the museum far from your home? How did you get there?

contexts.text: Not too far. I went there by bus. Where did you go, Guoguo?
contexts.synthesis_text: Not too far. I went there by bus. Where did you go, Guoguo?

contexts.text: I went to Hubei to see my grandparents. I learned to take care of plants and animals.
contexts.synthesis_text: I went to Hubei to see my grandparents. I learned to take care of plants and animals.

contexts.text: Hubei is far from here. How did you get there?
contexts.synthesis_text: Hubei is far from here. How did you get there?

contexts.text: Wow! All of us had a meaningful summer vacation.
contexts.synthesis_text: Wow! All of us had a meaningful summer vacation.

contexts.synthesis_text: Where did he/she go this summer vacation?
